chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-36 of 2006 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.08.2020 Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, DAG Mr. Muhammad Saleem Ansari advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Ziauddin Shaikh, advocate for respondents No.1 to 3 *** This constitutional petition is called for hearing, but none has appeared on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the previous date of hearing viz: 07.08.2019. It is noted that this petition was presented on 30.01.2006 and almost 14 years have been passed but time and again the matter is being adjourned without any substantial progress. It appears that perhaps the petitioner has lost interest in this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
